title: Rainy Delight Beef Dumplings
description: A fresh, gooey German dish featuring unsalted beef stock, these dumplings are perfect for a rainy day, offering comfort and warmth.

ingredients.name: Unsalted beef broth
ingredients.notes: Use at least 3.5L of water to create the broth

ingredients.name: Beef mince
ingredients.notes: Ensure it is fully chilled and cut into small pieces for better mixing

instructions: Heat the beef broth in a large pot to bring it to a simmer.
Add minced onions, stir for about 5 minutes until translucent.
Gradually add flour while stirring constantly, creating a smooth dough.
Divide the dough into small balls and flatten slightly with your hands or use a dumpling press.
Dip each flattened ball in the beef broth to seal them, then gently form into a half-moon shape.
Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add dumplings one by one and fry until golden brown on both sides (about 2-3 minutes per side).
Serve hot with your choice of dipping sauce or garnish.
